g.text: Redis cache + SQLite store — TTL-aware, source-ranked, deduped by headline hash
Fallback chain: source 1 fails → source 2 → source 3 → cached stale → LLM synthesized

svg.text: Fallback chain (no hardcoding): yfinance → Alpha Vantage free → RSS scraper → web scraper → cached stale data → LLM-synthesized estimate
Every layer logs which source was used. UI shows data freshness badge ("Live", "Cached 4h ago", "Estimated").
